reviewText: This might be the best face wash I’ve ever used, and I do NOT say that lightly. I have it on subscription because I panic a little at the thought of running out. For context: my skin has gone from oily, acne-prone chaos to “surprise! now you’re dry and... This might be the best face wash I’ve ever used, and I do NOT say that lightly. I have it on subscription because I panic a little at the thought of running out. For context: my skin has gone from oily, acne-prone chaos to “surprise! now you’re dry and post-menopausal” and somehow this cleanser handles ALL of it beautifully. It cleans deeply without stripping my skin, leaves my face feeling soft instead of tight, and somehow manages to make my skin look calmer, smoother, and less angry overall. My pores even look better. Also… the texture? Weirdly satisfying!! It has this rich, creamy feel that feels luxurious without being heavy. Now for my one complaint: The cap sucks and we are in an ongoing toxic relationship. The cleanser itself is elegant Korean skincare perfection. 5 stars!

reviewText: Refreshing and gentle — a solid cleanser for sensitive skin! I’ve been using the Anua Heartleaf Quercetinol Pore Deep Cleansing Foam for a few weeks now, and it’s become one of my favorite daily face washes. The texture is creamy and creates a soft foam that feels... Refreshing and gentle — a solid cleanser for sensitive skin! I’ve been using the Anua Heartleaf Quercetinol Pore Deep Cleansing Foam for a few weeks now, and it’s become one of my favorite daily face washes. The texture is creamy and creates a soft foam that feels gentle but still gives a deep clean. I have combination skin with visible pores around my nose, and this cleanser helps control oil without leaving my skin tight or dry. The heartleaf and quercetinol ingredients really seem to calm redness and irritation — perfect if you have sensitive or reactive skin. My pores look a bit smaller and my skin feels smoother overall. It also has a very mild, clean scent that doesn’t linger. The only small downside is that it can take a little effort to rinse completely if you use too much product. Otherwise, it’s great value for the quality and performance.

reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026
reviewText: I wanted to write this review because I am someone who has a history of fungal acne and it’s a struggle finding products that work, especially if it’s not preventive and I’ve already got some texture/breakouts going on. I scan everything through a fungal acne database ( Sezia) and this cleanser is safe with no outwardly triggering ingredients that support yeast. It is not an everyday cleanser, the ingredients support more of an every other day routine however it doesn’t make it any less effective. I can honestly say that I noticed an incredible reduction of stubborn texture after using this. The formula is a grainy kind of blend and has a freshness to it that wakes up the skin. I follow up with an spf and I’m good to go. I know some people said this wasn’t drying for their skin but honestly the actives in this were for me and I think for most people it would be. I will say AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. The bottle explicitly says this but I thought it was more because of the soap in the eye thing but unfortunately after using this to take off my eye makeup I developed a stye. I hadn’t done anything else new in my routine and I know heartleaf can irritate the eyes and clog the glands so I do think that was the cause. That was my fault though and this cleanser is good enough for me to keep using with the extra caution so I’m just putting it out there. I’ve attached photos of before and after using the cleanser ( 1 day apart )

reviewText: I use this gorgeous, buttery yet slightly thickly textured Anua cleansing cream directly after using the Anua cleansing oil for my “double cleansing” routine. I have very sensitive skin and this cleanser does not bother my skin or allergies at all. It cleans my skin and pores thoroughly but leaves my skin very soft and hydrated after rinsing clean. The Heartleaf has a lovely effect on my skin, leaving it bright and clear. I have never used a foaming cleanser that didn’t strip my skin but this does not. This does have a light minty/eucalyptus scent but I find it fresh and clean rather than pungent or overpowering. This is a generous 5.07 ounce size bottle and I use just a small amount because a little goes a long way. The quality and quantity of this high performing cleanser is excellent.

reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2026
reviewText: Tengo piel mixta y este limpiador en espuma se convirtió en un imprescindible de mi rutina. Lo uso como segundo paso de la doble limpieza, después del aceite, y es perfecto para terminar de limpiar la piel sin dejarla tirante. Hace una espuma suave y agradable que limpia muy bien, dejando la piel fresca, cómoda y realmente limpia. Me encanta porque ayuda a mantener los poros limpios y la textura de la piel se siente más uniforme con el uso constante. A pesar de ser un limpiador profundo, no reseca ni irrita, lo cual es clave para piel mixta. Lo uso todos los días y ya lo he vuelto a comprar, así que eso lo dice todo. Es ideal para quienes buscan una limpieza efectiva pero gentil para uso diario. Entiendo completamente por qué es tan popular y sin duda lo seguiré comprando.

The foaming texture feels light and refreshing, and it rinses clean without residue. I spent more time noticing how balanced my skin felt afterward than adjusting the amount used because a small pump already creates a good lather. Overall, this is a dependable everyday cleanser that balances effective oil control with a gentle and non drying feel.

reviewText: Eate producto es ideal para piel mixta a grasa He probado varios limpiadores faciales y este realmente cumple lo que promete si tienes piel normal a grasa. Lo que más me gusta es que limpia muy bien el exceso de grasa sin dejar esa sensación tirante que a veces dejan los productos espumosos. Hace espuma ligera (no exagerada), se enjuaga fácil y no deja residuo y tiene ingredientes claves que marcan la diferencia: Contiene 3 ceramidas esenciales que ayudan a mantener la barrera de la piel. Niacinamida, que calma y ayuda con la apariencia de los poros. Ácido hialurónico, que aporta hidratación ligera. Algo importante: no tiene fragancia, lo cual para mí es un punto muy positivo porque reduce el riesgo de irritación. Después de usarlo consistentemente, noto la piel limpia, equilibrada y menos brillante. Lo recomiendo especialmente para: Piel mixta Piel grasa Personas que buscan limpieza efectiva sin sensación agresiva No lo recomendaría si tienes piel muy seca, porque aunque no reseca en exceso, puede que necesites algo más cremoso. En general, excelente relación calidad-precio y el tamaño “value size” rinde bastante.

reviewText: I have been using CeraVe products for quite a while now. In fact, I have tried all of their products in their salicylic acid line. That includes this cleanser, the lotion, and the rough and bumpy skin cream. All of their products are top quality. This one is no... I have been using CeraVe products for quite a while now. In fact, I have tried all of their products in their salicylic acid line. That includes this cleanser, the lotion, and the rough and bumpy skin cream. All of their products are top quality. This one is no exception. It arrived well packaged, and in good condition, and it did not leak at all in transit. It is legitimately fragrance free. It has a smooth, non-greasy texture, that makes you wonder whether or not it’s even a soap, but it lathers up nicely. Sometimes I like to use it with an ultrasonic facial scrubber. They pair beautifully together. It leaves my skin feeling very fresh and clean. It has a smoothing quality to it because of the salicylic acid. Despite the fact that I have sensitive skin, it does not cause any irritation at all. I haven’t tried it as a make up remover, as I usually use micellar water for that, but I suspect it would work quite nicely. I decided to buy it on Amazon because it was actually cheaper than buying it in my local drugstore. In that regard, I think this is an excellent value.

reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
reviewText: Not a daily cleanser for sensitive skin but a magnificent exfoliater to gentle exfoliating facial wash if used in small amounts. It doesn't irritate or strip my skin as long as I use in small amounts and not daily, which is impressive considering I have rosacea, hence a... Not a daily cleanser for sensitive skin but a magnificent exfoliater to gentle exfoliating facial wash if used in small amounts. It doesn't irritate or strip my skin as long as I use in small amounts and not daily, which is impressive considering I have rosacea, hence a litte extra sensitive. I use it once or twice a week and thats just right. When I use this exfoliating wash it leaves my face feeling clean, refreshed, and more importantly smooth. I find my skin doesn't feel as textured or oily yet it does so without leaving it dry flaky or patchy, which allows me to put makeup on much more smoothly. Blemishes are also kept in check. It's no miracle but it does help. I even found it works great to exfoliate my dry feet, leaving heals much more smoother. However, less is more with this product. Too much (I mean anything more than a pea size) dries out my skin which in turn activates flakes and boosts oiliness that then gets trapped with the dry flakes which in turn quickly flares up the blemishes. So quantity is key here. Also, note that this is not a foaming cleanser. At least it doesn't really foam up as much as I would like. I miss the big lathering feel and took a min to get use to lack of it. Although this is a good exfoliater I find that this cleanser struggles with washing off makeup completely, especially color correcters and foundation. You will need to use a gentle makeup remover first for better results. Overall, its a good exfoliating cleanser but I wish it was more foamy and strong enough to wash makeup on its own in one go, but since its not my daily cleanser it is not a deal breaker.

reviewTitle: Holy Grail Cleanser - My Skin Has Never Looked Better!
reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
reviewText: CeraVe Renewing Salicylic Acid Cleanser has become my absolute holy grail skincare product! I've been using it for three months now, and the transformation in my skin has been nothing short of miraculous. This cleanser has earned a permanent spot in my daily routine,... CeraVe Renewing Salicylic Acid Cleanser has become my absolute holy grail skincare product! I've been using it for three months now, and the transformation in my skin has been nothing short of miraculous. This cleanser has earned a permanent spot in my daily routine, and I genuinely can't imagine my skincare regimen without it. I've always struggled with rough, bumpy skin texture and occasional breakouts. I'd tried numerous cleansers that were either too harsh and left my skin feeling stripped and tight, or too gentle and didn't effectively address my concerns. CeraVe has struck the perfect balance. The salicylic acid gently exfoliates and unclogs my pores without causing irritation or over-drying, which is exactly what my skin needed. What sets this cleanser apart is the phenomenal ingredient combination. The hyaluronic acid keeps my skin hydrated and plump, the niacinamide has visibly improved my skin tone and reduced redness, and the ceramides strengthen my skin barrier. I can actually see and feel the difference - my skin is smoother, clearer, and has a healthy glow that I never thought was possible for me. The texture of this cleanser is perfect - it's creamy but not heavy, and it foams up nicely without being stripping. I use it morning and night, and my skin feels thoroughly cleansed but never tight or uncomfortable. It removes all traces of dirt, oil, and even light makeup without any harsh scrubbing. My pores look visibly smaller and cleaner, and I've noticed significantly fewer blackheads on my nose and chin. Within the first two weeks, I noticed my skin texture becoming smoother. The rough patches on my forehead and cheeks started disappearing, and my overall complexion looked more refined. By week six, friends and coworkers were asking me what I'd been doing differently because my skin looked so radiant. That's when I knew this product was truly special. I also love that it's fragrance-free and developed with dermatologists. My skin is somewhat sensitive, and I've never experienced any irritation, redness, or adverse reactions. The bottle is a generous size and lasts for months, making it an incredible value for the quality you're getting. This cleanser works beautifully with the rest of my skincare products and has actually made my other products work better because my skin is properly prepped and exfoliated. I'm absolutely in love with CeraVe, and I recommend it to everyone!
